title: Metpalli Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Metpalli with a Z-Score of +3.69. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Metpalli has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is exceptionally high, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 11.9 GG, indicating a significant need for cooling. 
 The humidity level is at 66% and the wind speed is 3.3 km/h, which may exacerbate the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
